product_overview: Web-based IT help desk for creating, tracking and resolving support requests using a Kanban board, ticket detail pages, attachments, comments, and analytics. Built with Next.js, Supabase, and Firebase authentication.
core_goals: Provide a searchable, filterable Kanban board to manage ticket lifecycle (Nuevo -> En Progreso -> Resuelto).
Allow users to create tickets with optional file attachments and maintain chronological history and comments.
Support accessible state changes (drag-and-drop and an alternative "Mover a..." control) and CSV export of current view.
Offer an analytics dashboard displaying status counts and distributions by category and priority.
Ensure secure access control via authentication and Row Level Security so users only see authorized data.
Localize UI and UX in Spanish for all user-facing text, messages, and placeholders.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User sign-in and registration using Firebase (Email/Password and Google) with Spanish UI and success/error messaging.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email and password inputs -> Click "Iniciar sesión" -> Be redirected to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Click "Continuar con Google" -> Complete Google consent -> Be redirected to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email and password inputs with invalid credentials -> Click "Iniciar sesión" -> See error message describing failed authentication
Navigate to /login -> Fill email and password inputs with new account details -> Click "Registrarse" -> See success message and be redirected to /dashboard

features.name: Kanban Board Management
features.description: View, search, filter, reorder and transition tickets across status columns on the main dashboard with accessible controls and CSV export.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View tickets ordered by status in columns Nuevo, En Progreso, Resuelto -> See ticket cards with subject and priority
Navigate to /dashboard -> Type in search input to filter tickets by subject or description -> See filtered ticket list update
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select priority or category from dropdown filters -> See board update to show only matching tickets
Navigate to /dashboard -> Drag a ticket from Nuevo column to En Progreso column -> Drop ticket -> See ticket visually move to En Progreso and persist after refresh
Navigate to /dashboard -> Open ticket card menu and use "Mover a..." dropdown to change ticket status to Resuelto -> See ticket move to Resuelto column
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click "Exportar CSV" -> Download CSV file representing current filtered/visible tickets -> Open CSV and confirm rows match visible tickets
Navigate to /dashboard -> Drag a ticket between columns while network request fails -> See an error message and ticket remains in its original column (no status change persisted)
Navigate to /dashboard -> Apply filters that produce no results -> See empty state message explaining no tickets match the filters

features.name: Ticket Creation
features.description: Create new support tickets with required metadata and optional file attachments; creation persists to Supabase and logs history.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/crear -> Fill subject field -> Fill description field -> Select category from dropdown -> Select priority from dropdown -> Select a file to attach (optional) -> Click "Crear Ticket" -> Be redirected to /dashboard and see new ticket in Nuevo column
Navigate to /dashboard/crear -> Fill subject and description -> Do not attach a file -> Click "Crear Ticket" -> Be redirected to /dashboard and see new ticket without attachment in Nuevo column
Navigate to /dashboard/crear -> Leave subject empty -> Click "Crear Ticket" -> See validation error prompting to fill the subject field

Navigate to /dashboard/crear -> Select a file that exceeds storage limits or has unsupported type -> Click "Crear Ticket" -> See file upload error and ticket is not created until file issue is resolved

features.name: Ticket Detail and Comments
features.description: Inspect ticket metadata, download/view attachments, change status, add comments, and review chronological history on the ticket detail page.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/ticket/[id] -> View ticket metadata (subject, description, category, priority, status) -> See attachment link if present
Navigate to /dashboard/ticket/[id] -> Click attachment link -> File opens or downloads from Supabase storage
Navigate to /dashboard/ticket/[id] -> Change ticket status via "Cambiar estado" dropdown to En Progreso -> See status update reflected on page and an entry added to ticket history
Navigate to /dashboard/ticket/[id] -> Type in comment textarea -> Click "Comentar" -> See new comment appear in chronological comments list
Navigate to /dashboard/ticket/[id] -> Click ticket history tab -> See chronological audit log entries including status changes and attachments
Navigate to /dashboard/ticket/[id] -> Type an empty comment -> Click "Comentar" -> See validation error preventing empty comment submission
Navigate to /dashboard/ticket/[id] -> Change status while network request fails -> See an error toast and status remains unchanged; confirm history has no new entry

features.name: Metrics Dashboard
features.description: Provide analytics views with summary cards, charts by category/priority, and a recent tickets feed to help monitor workload and trends.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/metricas -> View summary cards showing total tickets by status -> See numeric counts and labels
Navigate to /dashboard/metricas -> View horizontal bar charts for categories and priorities -> Hover or inspect bars to see values
Navigate to /dashboard/metricas -> Scroll to recent tickets feed -> Click a ticket item -> Be redirected to /dashboard/ticket/[id]
Navigate to /dashboard/metricas -> Metrics API fails to return data -> See empty state or error message explaining metrics are temporarily unavailable

routes.description: Form to create new tickets with file upload
Detailed view of a ticket with comments and history
Analytics dashboard with charts and summaries

features.name: Kanban Board Management
features.description: View, filter, search, and drag-and-drop tickets across status columns
user_interactions: Drag a ticket from one column to another
Use "Mover a..." dropdown to change ticket status accessiblely
Type in search input to filter tickets by subject or description
Select priority or category from dropdown filters
Click "Exportar CSV" to download current view

features.name: Ticket Creation
features.description: Create a new support ticket with optional file attachment
user_interactions: Select category and priority from dropdowns

features.name: Ticket Detail and Comments
features.description: View ticket details, add comments, and track history
user_interactions: Click attachment link to view file
Change ticket status via "Cambiar estado" dropdown
Type in comment textarea and click "Comentar"

features.name: Metrics Dashboard
user_interactions: View horizontal bar charts for categories and priorities
